title: boechera falcatoria
intro: Boechera falcatoria, also known as rock cress, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae) and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Boechera falcatoria include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
